zero-dollar amount. If a prescription crosses the threshold, then the portion of the gross drug cost that 
is below the threshold will appear in this field. 

SHORT NAME: GDCBOOPT 

LONG NAME: GDC_BLW_OOPT_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 13 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Field length expanded from 10 to 13 in 2025. Reference the GDC_ABV_OOPT_AMT variable for the 
portion of the gross drug cost that was covered by Part D’s catastrophic coverage.
